notes: Genshin Impact player support demo. Covers gacha/wish disputes, account recovery, top-ups and refunds, and compensation requests. Audience: demo for Omilia CPO + C-level (Apr 22). All data is fabricated for demo purposes; not affiliated with HoYoverse.

use_cases.name: Account_Recovery
use_cases.description: Player lost access to their Genshin Impact account — forgot password, changed phone number, lost email access, or was locked out after suspicious activity. Needs to recover access to their UID.
common_failures: Caller has no UID and no access to original email
Account linked to platform account (PSN/Apple) that is also locked
Region mismatch between caller's stated server and UID's actual region

edge_case.description: Player locked out of both the game and the linked email account — cannot provide UID or email verification code
edge_case.stage3_failure: Agent repeats 'I need your UID to proceed' and cannot offer alternative paths, eventually transfers to a supervisor
edge_case.stage4_resolution: Agent asks for last top-up amount and date, last 5-star character pulled, device model, and approximate Adventure Rank — multi-factor knowledge-based verification, then initiates a secure account recovery flow

use_cases.name: Wish_And_Gacha_Disputes
use_cases.description: Player contacting about the wish (gacha) system — frustrated about not getting a featured 5-star character after many pulls, questioning the pity counter, wish history appears incorrect, or accidentally pulled on wrong banner.
common_failures: Player does not understand soft pity (starts at pull 75)
Player pulled on Standard Banner by mistake expecting limited 5-star
Wish history shows 5-star that player does not remember receiving (sold for Stardust)

edge_case.description: Player completed 80 pulls on the character event banner without a 5-star and is extremely frustrated, threatening to quit
edge_case.stage3_failure: Agent reads the pity policy verbatim — 'the guaranteed 5-star is at pull 90, your situation is within expected parameters' — no empathy, caller hangs up angrier
edge_case.stage4_resolution: Agent empathises, confirms pull 80 means soft pity is active (75-90 range has dramatically elevated 5-star rate), reassures the character will drop within the next 1-10 wishes, offers to set up in-app wish tips, thanks the player for their patience

use_cases.name: Top_Up_And_Refund
use_cases.description: Player contacting about payments — Genesis Crystals not received after purchase, duplicate charge, unauthorized purchase, or requesting a refund (especially for minor accounts under parental controls).
common_failures: Order succeeded on payment processor but Genesis Crystals delayed in delivery
Player purchased Welkin Moon twice in 24h by accident
Parent calls about child's in-app purchases without being the registered account holder

edge_case.description: Parent calls about their 12-year-old child who spent 520 USD on Genesis Crystals without permission over three days
edge_case.stage3_failure: Agent cites the blanket 'all sales of consumable items are final' policy, refuses any refund, tells the parent to dispute with their bank — parent escalates complaint to regulator
edge_case.stage4_resolution: Agent expresses empathy, acknowledges the Minor Account Protection Policy, offers full refund upon guardian identity verification (government ID + child's date of birth + last four of payment method), walks the parent through enabling parental controls so this cannot happen again, opens a refund ticket with expedited review

use_cases.name: Compensation_And_Bugs
use_cases.description: Player contacting about losing event progress due to a server outage, bug-caused loss of materials or characters, missed login rewards because of unavailability, or requesting compensation after a known incident.
common_failures: Issue is not tied to a confirmed incident — requires manual review
Player cannot provide exact timestamp of the loss
Bug was caused by third-party tool use (not eligible for compensation)

edge_case.description: Player lost two days of Spiral Abyss progress during an 18-hour server outage in the Asia region — outage was confirmed but the standard compensation (300 Primogems) feels insufficient given the player's Season Pass event timing
edge_case.stage3_failure: Agent applies the flat 300-Primogem standard compensation from the policy table, does not explore additional goodwill, player leaves unhappy
edge_case.stage4_resolution: Agent confirms the incident, applies the standard 300 Primogems, escalates for goodwill top-up (additional 3 Intertwined Fates and 60 Primogems for the missed daily commissions), issues a written apology via in-game mail, offers a direct re-entry grace period for the current Season Pass milestone — learned empathy and goodwill escalation from top-performing human agents

glossary.UID: Unique player identifier — a 9-digit number assigned to each player account. First digit indicates server region (6=America, 7=Europe, 8=Asia, 9=TW/HK/MO).
glossary.Primogem: Premium in-game currency earned through gameplay, events, and daily activities. Cannot be purchased directly. Used to buy Fates for wishes.
glossary.Genesis Crystal: Premium currency purchased with real money. Converts 1-to-1 into Primogems in-game.
glossary.Mora: Standard in-game gold — used for character and weapon upgrades, talent books, and vendor purchases.
glossary.Fate: Wish currency. Two types — Acquaint Fate (for Standard Wish) and Intertwined Fate (for Character and Weapon Event Wishes).
glossary.Pity: The guaranteed-rarity counter. Hard pity at pull 90 (5-star) and 10 (4-star) on character banners.
glossary.Soft Pity: The probability boost that begins around pull 75 on 5-star wishes. Drop rates increase sharply between pulls 75 and 89.
glossary.Welkin Moon: A 30-day subscription granting 300 Genesis Crystals immediately plus 90 Primogems daily.
glossary.Battle Pass: Seasonal premium pass with paid track rewards including Acquaint Fates and a selectable 4-star weapon.
glossary.Adventure Rank: Account-level progression (AR 1-60) that unlocks world tiers and content.
glossary.Resin: Daily activity energy used for domains and weekly bosses. Regenerates 1 per 8 minutes (max 160).
glossary.Spiral Abyss: Endgame rotating challenge mode. Resets every two weeks. Top rewards include Primogems and Fragile Resin.
glossary.Banner: A time-limited character or weapon wish event (e.g., 'Raiden Shogun Rerun', 'Epitome Invocation').
glossary.HoYoverse Account: The master account that holds one or more UIDs across HoYoverse games (Genshin Impact, Honkai Star Rail, etc.).

wish_history_samples.note: This is the edge-case player — 82 pulls, no 5-star, soft pity active. Used in Stage 3 (rigid refusal) and Stage 4 (empathetic explanation).

known_incidents.note: Affects Kaito (832458917) and Yuki (832118007). Used in Compensation Stage 3/4.
